In addition to this year-end statement, the Stock Plan Services Participant Trust
will send you a "Grantor Letter" which details certain US tax matters related to
your beneficial interest in the trust for the year, and (if applicable) additional US
tax forms relating to US tax matters. You should consult your tax adviser
regarding how this income should be treated under the tax rules that apply to you.

STOCK PLAN
Items shown under "Stock Plans" represent your interests under your company's stock plans, for which Fidelity Stock Plan Services LLC provides administrative and record keeping services.
Items shown under "Stock Plans" are not assets held in your Fidelity brokerage account, and therefore are not carried by NFS and are not covered by SIPC. Fidelity Stock Plan Services LLC
provides this statement to you as part of administrative and recordkeeping services it provides to the company. See the Participant Agreement for details.

withdrawable assets. This information is included on your statement solely as a service to
you. It is derived from information provided by your company and Fidelity is not responsible
for its accuracy.

statement to you as part of administrative and recordkeeping services it provides to the company. See the Participant Agreement for details.
